app.name: pwn2report
app.tagline: Write pentest reports, offline and encrypted.

vault.title: Vault
vault.createSubtitle: Pick a passphrase to encrypt your reports on this device.
vault.unlockSubtitle: Enter your passphrase to access your reports.
vault.rememberHint: Stores the passphrase in the OS keychain for one-tap unlock.
vault.tooShort: Passphrase must be at least 8 characters.
vault.keychainFailed: Could not unlock from the saved passphrase.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: All your engagements in one place.
reports.deleteConfirm: Delete this report and all its findings? This cannot be undone.

empty.title: No reports yet
empty.body: Create your first report to start documenting findings.

report.scopePlaceholder: Targets, environments and constraints in scope…

findings.title: Findings

kbPicker.title: Add from knowledge base
kbPicker.empty: Your knowledge base is empty. Add entries from the Knowledge Base page first.
kbPicker.added: Finding added from the knowledge base.
kbPicker.error: Could not add the finding from the knowledge base.

empty.title: No findings yet
empty.body: Add your first finding to this report.

findings.deleteConfirm: Delete this finding? This cannot be undone.

discard.title: Discard unsaved changes?
discard.body: You have unsaved changes in this finding. If you close now, they will be lost.

validation.lineRange: The end line must be greater than or equal to the start line.

findings.fieldTitlePlaceholder: e.g. SQL injection in login form
findings.fieldSummaryPlaceholder: What is the issue, in one or two sentences…
findings.fieldBusinessImpactPlaceholder: What it means for the business…
findings.fieldPocScenarioPlaceholder: Context and preconditions for the exploit…
findings.fieldPocStepsPlaceholder: e.g. Send the crafted request to /login

evidence.saveFirst: Save the finding first, then you can attach evidence images here.
evidence.empty: No images yet. Add a screenshot to illustrate this finding.
evidence.caption: Caption
evidence.deleteConfirm: Delete this image? This cannot be undone.
evidence.pasteHint: Tip: copy an image and press Ctrl+V to paste it here.
evidence.pasteEmpty: No image found in the clipboard.

annotator.title: Annotate image
annotator.saveError: Could not save the annotated image.
annotator.deleteOriginalError: Saved the redacted image, but could not delete the original. Delete it manually so the un-redacted version does not remain.
annotator.redactHint: Redaction is permanently baked into the saved pixels.
annotator.replaceHint: Saving replaces the original with the redacted version. Redactions are permanently baked into the pixels and the un-redacted original is deleted.

kb.title: Knowledge base
kb.subtitle: A reusable catalog of vulnerabilities to drop into any report.
kb.importError: Could not import the bundled catalog.
kb.deleteConfirm: Delete this knowledge base entry? This cannot be undone.

empty.title: Your knowledge base is empty
empty.body: Import the bundled catalog of common vulnerabilities, or create your own entries.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your vault and report templates.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.subtitle: Choose the app theme and language.
appearance.showIntroHint: Show the welcome tour again on your next unlock.

ai.title: AI assistance
ai.subtitle: Improve and generate report text with a language model.
ai.enabledHint: Off by default. No data is sent to any provider unless assistance is enabled.
ai.cloudWarningTitle: Cloud provider — your report content leaves your device
ai.cloudWarningBody: With a cloud provider, the text you ask the AI to process (findings, summaries, notes — which may contain sensitive client data) is sent over the internet to this third party. Only enable this if your engagement rules and client allow it.
ai.cloudWarningLocalHint: Prefer Ollama (local) to keep all data on your machine.
ai.localNote: Ollama (local) is the privacy-preserving default: your report content is processed on your own machine and never leaves it.
ai.apiKeyKeepPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep the existing key
ai.apiKeyHint: The key is stored encrypted inside your vault.
ai.testError: Could not reach the AI provider.
ai.saveError: Could not save the AI configuration.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Change your master passphrase or back up your vault.
security.backupHint: Save an encrypted copy of your vault to another location.
security.backupError: Could not back up the vault.

sync.title: Sync
sync.subtitle: Move your reports between devices with an encrypted bundle — no server required.
sync.description: A sync bundle is an end-to-end encrypted file you can move between devices over any channel (USB drive, Syncthing, Nextcloud …). Nothing is sent to a server. Merges are conflict-free: for each item, the most recent edit wins.
sync.exportHint: Create an encrypted bundle of your data to carry to another device.
sync.exportError: Could not export the sync bundle.
sync.importHint: Merge a bundle from another device into this vault.
sync.importError: Could not import the sync bundle.
sync.passphraseExportDescription: Choose a passphrase to encrypt the bundle. You will need it to import it on another device.
sync.passphraseImportDescription: Enter the passphrase used to encrypt this bundle.

templates.title: Templates
templates.subtitle: Customize the Typst source used to render each report type.
templates.resetConfirm: Reset this template to its built-in default? Your changes will be lost.

ai.empty: Type some text first so the AI has something to improve.

preview.title: AI suggestion
preview.hint: Review the result before it replaces your text.

welcome.title: Welcome to pwn2report
welcome.body: Write polished security reports, offline and encrypted on your device. Here is a quick tour to get you started.

reports.title: Create a report
reports.body: Start by creating a report for your engagement, then fill in the executive summary, scope and methodology.

findings.title: Add findings
findings.body: Add findings manually, from your reusable knowledge base, or by importing scanner output (SARIF, Nuclei, ZAP, Burp, Nessus).

evidence.title: Attach evidence
evidence.body: Attach screenshots and annotate them — redact sensitive data, box and point out the important details right inside the app.

export.title: Export your report
export.body: Generate the final report as PDF, Word (DOCX), Markdown or HTML in a single click.

ai.title: Optional AI assistance
ai.body: Enable AI assistance in Settings to improve, generate or translate your report text. Off by default — your data stays private until you turn it on.
